critical_extraction_note: WS7 has TWO parts. Part 1 (path matching) is the more diagnostically important part for AI-CFT. Sample student JSON only shows Part 2 (own rules). Part 1 was not extracted. This must be flagged.

part_1.description: Match 3 given decision rules to paths A, B, C in a provided decision tree. The tree uses Energy (180 kcal) and Protein (7.7g) as variables.

answer_key.path_A_rule: Bir yiyeceğin enerji değeri 180 kcal'den azsa, muhtemelen tavsiye edilebilir.
answer_key.path_B_rule: Bir yiyeceğin enerji değeri 180 kcal'den büyük veya eşitse ve protein değeri 7.7 g'dan azsa, muhtemelen tavsiye edilemez.
answer_key.path_C_rule: Bir yiyeceğin enerji değeri 180 kcal'den büyük veya eşitse ve protein değeri 7.7 g'dan büyük veya eşitse, muhtemelen tavsiye edilebilir.

WS7_P1_box1.item_label: Match for Rule: enerji ≥ 180 AND protein < 7.7 → not recommended

WS7_P1_box3.item_label: Match for Rule: enerji ≥ 180 AND protein ≥ 7.7 → recommended

part_1.extraction_status_for_sample: NOT_CAPTURED — items WS7_P1_box1/2/3 are absent from sample student JSON. This is a critical gap. B4-B7 being empty likely corresponds to this part.

part_2.description: Student writes their own if-then rules based on their own decision tree (from WS6). Number of rules = number of paths in their tree. No single correct answer — evaluated on logical consistency with their WS6 tree.

credit_rules.full: Rule is a complete if-then statement. Variables and thresholds match WS6 tree. Operator directions are correct (e.g. ≤ for left branch, > for right). Classification outcome matches the corresponding leaf in WS6.
credit_rules.partial: Rule is structurally if-then but threshold or outcome inconsistent with WS6 tree.
credit_rules.zero: Empty or not in if-then form.

credit_rules.full: Complete if-then rule, consistent with WS6.
credit_rules.partial: Structural rule but inconsistent with WS6.

credit_rules.full: Complete if-then rule, consistent with WS6.
credit_rules.partial: Structural rule but inconsistent with WS6.
credit_rules.zero: Empty or not needed (acceptable if tree has fewer paths).

WS7_B4_to_B7.item_label: Own Rules 4-7 (if tree has more paths)
WS7_B4_to_B7.note: If student's WS6 tree has only 3 paths, B4-B7 are legitimately empty. Do NOT score as zero — score as not_applicable if tree_path_count from WS6 is ≤ 3.

credit_rules.full: Complete rule consistent with WS6 if path exists.
credit_rules.not_applicable: Tree has fewer paths than this item's position.
credit_rules.zero: Empty when tree should have more paths.

overall_scoring.full: Part 1: all 3 path matchings correct. Part 2: own rules match WS6 tree structure.
overall_scoring.partial: Part 1 missing OR Part 2 rules partially consistent with WS6.
overall_scoring.zero: Part 1 missing AND Part 2 empty or inconsistent.
